blocks.task: RISC-V tail call optimization: how should TCO work in a RISC-V emulator? Analyze recursive function patterns, identify where jumps can replace calls.
blocks.summary: THINK: RISC-V TCO already handles direct self-recursion. To extend: (1) general tail call = replace jal+epilogue+ret with epilogue+j, applicable to any function call in return position. (2) IIFE = detect fn(params){body}(args) pattern, inline the body directly. Both are codegen-level transforms.
blocks.details: THINK: RISC-V TCO already handles direct self-recursion.
